frictions.description: Quiet Cargo execution (`-q`) suppressed per-test pass output, so the paired `-- --list` commands were required to map assertion IDs to concrete unit tests before using the passing suite runs as execution evidence.
frictions.resolution: Captured both test listings and full suite outputs and linked them together per assertion.
